feature_name: levenshtein(s1, s2, int id, int r, int t)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, string1 VARCHAR(255), string2 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, string1, string2) VALUES (1, 'kitten', 'sitting');
UPDATE test_strings SET string2 = 'bitten' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, levenshtein(string1, string2, 4, 2, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, levenshtein('example', 'samples', 4, 2, 1) AS distance FROM test_strings LIMIT 1;
